prompt: Create a moody fine-art fashion portrait of an adult woman photographed through rain-streaked glass, with a soft gray concrete wall behind her and the feeling of being enclosed by rain, glass, and time. The subject has wet black hair hanging messily around her face and shoulders, a centered seated pose, bare shoulders, a black deep V camisole, loose white trousers, and an oversized white button-up shirt slipped off both shoulders and bunched around her arms. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur/censor block, while the body and clothing remain sharp enough to read. Shoot vertically in a realistic editorial photography style, muted monochrome palette, cool gray and white tones, soft diffused daylight from the left, high contrast between wet dark hair and pale wall, translucent water trails and droplets running down the glass in front of the camera, subtle reflections, hazy atmosphere, delicate skin highlights, quiet melancholic mood, like a photograph slowly turning into a memory. Use a 4:5 portrait composition, subject centered from thighs to head, minimal background, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
